title: The Rook Lift
summary: Bring a rook to attack via the 3rd rank

steps.title: Lift and Swing
steps.text: A rook lift is the maneuver Re1-e3-g3 (or h3) — the rook rises to the third rank, then swings across to attack the enemy king. Classic pattern: Re3, Qh5 with kingside fireworks.

steps.title: When to Use It
steps.text: Rook lifts work when: the position is half-closed (rook can't use files directly), the enemy king is castled, and you have pieces already nearby. Works especially well combined with h-pawn pushes.
